The Division 2 Lore Coverage

Expected totals remain intentionally unknown until the in-game menus and release-by-release source inventory are captured and reconciled.

Last audited 2026-07-18. Unknown totals are deliberately not estimated.

CategoryExpectedCapturedSource reviewedHuman reviewedPublishedStatus
